name: link
visual_summary: A link component is used to connect users to other pages, either within the same website or an external website, often styled visually to stand out. It can be used when a clickable action is required, such as navigation or linking to a resource.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready link component with the following characteristics:

Name: link
Description: A link component is used to connect users to other pages, either within the same website or an external website, often styled visually to stand out. It can be used when a clickable action is required, such as navigation or linking to a resource.
Style: flat, rounded, outline
Interactions: clickable, hover, active
Tags: link, clickable, navigation

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
